players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: RBI single off Buehler chased the Dodger starter; reached 100 career HR milestone earlier in the road trip.

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: Off day Thursday; Phillies open at Atlanta Friday with Harper expected to slot in as cleanup.

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: 0-for-4 but scored the tying run after reaching on an E6; Giants salvaged series finale 3-0.

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: Slow start continues — slashing .235 through 17 games; Mets enjoy off day after being swept by LAD.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: Hit his first HR of the year Apr 14 to snap an 0-for-19 stretch; .132 AVG still worst of his career.

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: Cubs off day; PCA leads the team in SB (6) and sits 3rd in NL CF WAR through three weeks.

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: Padres rolled to 8th straight win; Merrill quiet day but batting .320 across the streak.

players.name: Teoscar Hernández
players.summary: 4 HR through 16 games; Dodgers off day before hosting Rangers this weekend.

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: 3rd-inning 2-run HR traveled 446 ft but Yankees fell 11-4 to Angels after Halos put up 4 in the 6th.

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: Mets off day; Williams still shaking off Tuesday's grand slam allowed. Role secure per Mendoza.

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: 4th rehab start Apr 14 was sharp: 5.2 IP, 3 ER, 9 K, 0 BB, 72 pitches, touched 95 mph. One more rehab Sunday Apr 19.

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Between starts after dominant 4/14 outing (6 IP, 1 H, 0 ER vs DET); next start projected 4/19 or 4/20.

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: No rehab activity reported on flexor strain; Reds still without a return timeline.

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Strong line vs OAK Thursday — 6 IP, 1 ER, 7 K; leaves with no-decision but Rangers win 3-2 in 10.

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Next start lined up Apr 19 vs CHC at Dodger Stadium; coming off a 5-IP, 2-ER outing Apr 13.

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Last start 4/14 was his best of the year: 7+ IP, 1 R, 9 K vs NYY. ERA down to 3.53 after three starts.

injuries.name: Zack Wheeler
injuries.note: Encouraging 4th rehab start (5.2 IP, 9 K, touched 95 mph). One more Sunday Apr 19; targeting return weekend of Apr 24-26 at ATL.

injuries.name: Chase Burns
injuries.note: No rehab activity reported. Still shut down.
